verify_results.name: usub_sat_assume_ule_zero_bound_i8
verify_results.body:
declare void @llvm.assume(i1)
declare i8 @llvm.usub.sat.i8(i8, i8)

define i1 @usub_sat_assume_ule_zero_bound_i8(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %pre = icmp ule i8 %x, 0
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %pre)
  %r = call i8 @llvm.usub.sat.i8(i8 %x, i8 %y)
  %cmp = icmp ule i8 %r, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}

verify_results.name: usub_sat_assume_with_constant_decrement_one_i64
verify_results.body:
declare void @llvm.assume(i1)
declare i64 @llvm.usub.sat.i64(i64, i64)

define i1 @usub_sat_assume_with_constant_decrement_one_i64(i64 %index, i64 %limit) {
  %pre = icmp ult i64 %index, %limit
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %pre)
  %r = call i64 @llvm.usub.sat.i64(i64 %index, i64 1)
  %cmp = icmp ult i64 %r, %limit
  ret i1 %cmp
}
